changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_orders_customer_created ON orders(customer_id, created_time DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_order_items_supplier_created ON order_items(supplier_id, created_time);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notif_customer_state ON notifications(customer_id, state_id, created_time DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_recently_viewed_user_time ON user_recently_viewed(user_id, viewed_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_wishlist_user_added ON wishlist_items(user_id, added_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_support_agent_state ON support_tickets(assigned_agent_id, state_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_coupon_usage_user ON coupon_usage_log(user_id, used_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_review_votes_review ON review_votes(review_id, vote_type);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cart_expires ON cart(expires_at);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sli_order_created ON settlement_line_items(order_id, created_time);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_offer_product_active ON offer(product_id, active);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_shipments_customer ON shipments(customer_id, created_time DESC);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE products ADD CONSTRAINT ck_products_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE product_activity_log ADD CONSTRAINT ck_product_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE brands ADD CONSTRAINT ck_brands_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE product_specifications ADD CONSTRAINT ck_product_specs_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE product_questions ADD CONSTRAINT ck_product_questions_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE orders ADD CONSTRAINT ck_orders_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE order_items ADD CONSTRAINT ck_order_items_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE order_activity ADD CONSTRAINT ck_order_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE order_addresses ADD CONSTRAINT ck_order_addresses_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE order_status_history ADD CONSTRAINT ck_order_status_history_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE user_profiles ADD CONSTRAINT ck_user_profiles_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE user_address ADD CONSTRAINT ck_user_address_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE user_activity_log ADD CONSTRAINT ck_user_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE user_recently_viewed ADD CONSTRAINT ck_user_recently_viewed_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE wishlist_items ADD CONSTRAINT ck_wishlist_items_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE cart ADD CONSTRAINT ck_cart_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE cart_item ADD CONSTRAINT ck_cart_item_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE cart_activity_log ADD CONSTRAINT ck_cart_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE checkout ADD CONSTRAINT ck_checkout_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE checkout_item ADD CONSTRAINT ck_checkout_item_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE checkout_saga_log ADD CONSTRAINT ck_checkout_saga_log_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE payment ADD CONSTRAINT ck_payment_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE payment_refunds ADD CONSTRAINT ck_payment_refunds_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE payment_webhook_log ADD CONSTRAINT ck_payment_webhook_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE saved_payment_methods ADD CONSTRAINT ck_saved_payment_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE inventory_item ADD CONSTRAINT ck_inventory_item_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE inventory_item_activity ADD CONSTRAINT ck_inventory_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE fulfillment_centers ADD CONSTRAINT ck_fulfillment_centers_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE offer ADD CONSTRAINT ck_offer_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE offer_activity_log ADD CONSTRAINT ck_offer_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE supplier ADD CONSTRAINT ck_supplier_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE supplier_activity ADD CONSTRAINT ck_supplier_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE supplier_onboarding ADD CONSTRAINT ck_supplier_onboarding_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE supplier_performance ADD CONSTRAINT ck_supplier_performance_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE shipments ADD CONSTRAINT ck_shipments_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE shipping_activity ADD CONSTRAINT ck_shipping_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE shipping_rates ADD CONSTRAINT ck_shipping_rates_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE shipping_tracking_events ADD CONSTRAINT ck_shipping_tracking_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE notifications ADD CONSTRAINT ck_notifications_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE notification_activity ADD CONSTRAINT ck_notification_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE notification_templates ADD CONSTRAINT ck_notification_templates_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE notification_preferences ADD CONSTRAINT ck_notification_preferences_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE coupon ADD CONSTRAINT ck_coupon_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE promo_code_activity_log ADD CONSTRAINT ck_promo_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE product_reviews ADD CONSTRAINT ck_product_reviews_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE review_activity ADD CONSTRAINT ck_review_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

ALTER TABLE pricing_rules ADD CONSTRAINT ck_pricing_rules_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE tax_rates ADD CONSTRAINT ck_tax_rates_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE catalog_items ADD CONSTRAINT ck_catalog_items_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

ALTER TABLE warehouse_locations ADD CONSTRAINT ck_warehouse_locations_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

ALTER TABLE onboarding_activity ADD CONSTRAINT ck_onboarding_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);

changeSet.author: homebase
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE policy ADD CONSTRAINT ck_policy_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE policy_rule ADD CONSTRAINT ck_policy_rule_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE policy_activity_log ADD CONSTRAINT ck_policy_activity_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE decisions ADD CONSTRAINT ck_decisions_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE cconfig ADD CONSTRAINT ck_cconfig_tenant CHECK (tenant IS NOT NULL);
